content.question: What is the current utilization rate of gimnázium dormitories relative to capacity, and how would enrollment decline affect dormitory viability in cities with currently over-subscribed 6/8-year tracks?
content.reduction_path: Survey and collate dormitory capacity, occupancy, and operating-cost data for key urban centers; project occupancy under 10%, 20%, 30% cohort-size reductions; identify break-even occupancy rates and financial sustainability thresholds
